overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City during golden hour. The player navigates from a sidewalk under an elevated highway, across a street intersection with passing vehicles, and into a narrower commercial alley leading to an industrial area with scattered debris.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway structure

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green safety vest walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large concrete overpass with metal supports spanning across the street
tall palm tree visible against the sky
multi-story building with weathered facades and signage
black metal railing separating sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a city sidewalk beneath a massive elevated highway structure during golden hour. The player walks forward alongside other pedestrians, with palm trees and commercial buildings visible in the distance. Metal railings line the right side of the path separating the walkway from the street.

events.description: steps off sidewalk onto crosswalk to cross the multi-lane street
multiple vehicles drive through the intersection, passing in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection while observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: dark sedan driving through the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: multi-lane asphalt street with yellow dividing lines and crosswalk markings
tall pole with traffic signals and electrical wires

segments.scene_description: The player steps off the sidewalk and crosses the wide intersection. Vehicles pass through the crosswalk as the camera moves across the asphalt. The elevated highway structure shifts to the right side of the frame while commercial buildings become visible on the left.

events.description: reaches the opposite sidewalk and continues past commercial storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrower sidewalk past various shops and storefronts

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red coat walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: ground-level shop with large windows and signage
illuminated commercial sign attached to building facade
tall street light with overhead fixture

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the street, the player continues along a narrower commercial sidewalk lined with storefronts and neon signs. The elevated highway recedes into the distance on the right as the path leads deeper into the commercial district.

events.description: ground becomes littered with newspapers and cardboard debris
transitioning to industrial area with large warehouse buildings and smokestacks

agents.ego_description: continuing through the debris-strewn alley toward industrial buildings in the distance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead in the distance toward the industrial zone

entered.detail: large industrial structure with blue and yellow painted walls
scattered trash including newspapers and cardboard pieces littering the sidewalk
large screen displaying colorful advertisements on the warehouse wall
tall factory chimneys emitting smoke visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The environment shifts to a grittier industrial alleyway where the sidewalk is littered with newspapers and cardboard debris. Large warehouse buildings with digital billboards dominate the left side, while industrial smokestacks rise in the distance. The golden hour light casts long shadows across the trash-strewn path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bustling city sidewalk beneath a massive highway into a gritty, debris-strewn industrial alleyway during golden hour. It begins by moving along a pedestrian walkway lined with metal railings and palm trees, sheltered by the heavy concrete structure of an elevated road. As the camera steps off the curb, the scene opens up to a wide intersection where vehicles pass through the crosswalk and the highway structure shifts toward the right of the frame. The path then narrows as the camera moves past commercial storefronts and neon signs, causing the highway to recede into the distance. Finally, the environment shifts into a shadowed industrial corridor where the sidewalk becomes littered with newspapers and cardboard, flanked by large warehouses and distant smokestacks under the fading golden light.
